ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO code for the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the campaign is run */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign (e.g., Travel, Local, General) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector being targeted by the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_target_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Travel, Local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of the sector (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_subsectors" (
  "subsector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsector */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector that the subsector belongs to */,
  "subsector_name" TEXT /* Name of the subsector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subsector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_subsectors_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., Banner, Button) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience for the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_widgets" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign using the widget */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget being used */,
  "widget_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the widget appears in the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id", "widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widget_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Clicks, Impressions) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widget_metrics_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES widgets ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., All, Travel & Local, Widgets) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being tracked */,
  "change_value" INTEGER /* Value of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_changes_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES campaign_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widget_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being tracked */,
  "change_value" INTEGER /* Value of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widget_changes_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES widget_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketer, analyst, admin) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the user is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the campaign or widget */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being accessed */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign or widget was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES widgets ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the permission applies to */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget the permission applies to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES widgets ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
